extract: Uva Academy (Japanese: グレープアカデミー Grape Academy) is a school located in Mesagoza in the Paldea region. Uva Academy is exclusive to Pokémon Violet. It is a sister school to Blueberry Academy located in Unova's ocean. In Pokémon Scarlet, it is replaced by Naranja Academy. The two schools are essentially the same, with the only differences being that Uva uses grape imagery where Naranja uses orange imagery, Uva has a purple color scheme where Naranja has an orange color scheme, Uva has the Violet Book where Naranja has the Scarlet Book, and Professor Turo is an alum of Uva Academy while Professor Sada is an alum of Naranja Academy.
